nasb.text: and through Him everyone who believes is freed from all things, from which you could not be freed through the Law of Moses.

esv.text: and by him everyone who believes is freed from everything from which you could not be freed by the law of Moses.

cnv.text: 信靠他的人就得稱義了。

ccb.text: 你们靠遵行摩西律法不能被称为义人，只有信靠耶稣才能被称为义人。

csbs.text: 藉着这一位，所有相信的人都被称为义了。
